metadata.name: Handle Retailer Inquiry about Shipping Delay

description: A retailer calls to ask why their recent order has not yet shipped.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the order in the system.

nodes.task_description: Check the status of the order and find that it is on hold due to a backordered item.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies the specific item that is holding up the entire order.

nodes.task_description: Inform the retailer about the backordered item and provide the expected in-stock date.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly explains the situation to the customer.

nodes.task_description: Offer to split the shipment so the in-stock items can ship immediately.

expected_outcome.value: The retailer agrees, and the agent modifies the order to create a partial shipment.
